changelog.summary: High-security login system overhaul with TOTP 2FA, CJIS-compliant login UI, password policy enforcement, and admin CRUD access

changes.description: TOTP two-factor authentication via Google Authenticator with QR code enrollment
Mandatory 2FA enforcement for all roles with blocking setup modal
CJIS-compliant login page with security banners and two-step authentication flow
Backup recovery codes (10 one-time codes) with AES-256-GCM encrypted secret storage
Strengthened password policy: 12+ characters, special characters required, 90-day expiry, 5-password history
Admin panel: 2FA policy controls, IP session binding settings, per-user 2FA reset
Admin role granted full CRUD access across all modules
Fixed QR code not appearing during 2FA setup (property name mismatch)

changelog.summary: Fix dropdown menus, mobile drawer, mobile layout optimizations

changes.description: Fixed mobile drawer not opening (missing CSS .open class)
Fixed desktop nav dropdown menus clipped by overflow:hidden
Mobile layout optimized for all 10 remaining pages
MapPage bottom sheet with Units/Calls/Layers tabs

changelog.summary: Thin client, HTTPS encryption, GPS breadcrumb trails, version unification

changes.description: Desktop app converted to thin client — loads from remote VPS instead of local server
Full HTTPS/SSL encryption for all connections and auto-updates
GPS breadcrumb trails at 1-second intervals with accuracy filtering and jump detection
Server-side trail smoothing eliminates starburst artifacts from WiFi triangulation
Mandatory operator name input with persistent OPR display
Unified version propagation across all system components

changelog.summary: Radio system overhaul, PDF readability, Motorola tones, two-way PTT audio

changes.description: Two-way PTT radio with real-time audio streaming via WebSocket
Motorola APX-authentic radio tones (MDC-1200 FSK, 1050Hz talk-permit, bandpass filtering)
500ms PTT release delay (hang time) to prevent syllable clipping
PDF readability overhaul with professional print formatting
Audio pipeline race condition — transmit_start now sent before recorder starts
StreamPlayer rewritten with AudioContext + decodeAudioData for reliable cross-browser playback
Comprehensive server-side radio debug logging for audio relay diagnostics

changelog.summary: Panic system fixes and version tooling

changes.description: Fixed panic button using separate GPS instance instead of shared coordinates
Fixed panic audio relay missing sender userId for talk-back
Prevented panic alert showing to the sender themselves
Version bump script with semantic versioning support

changelog.summary: GPS breadcrumb trails, VPS health monitoring, semantic versioning

changes.description: GPS breadcrumb trail tracking with colored polylines on map
VPS/host health monitoring (CPU, RAM, disk, load, OS) in System Health tab
Semantic versioning system with detailed changelog
Version display with changelog viewer in System Health tab
Login 'Initializing...' flash after successful authentication

changelog.summary: ServeManager integration, shift planning, Android app

changes.description: ServeManager API integration for civil process serving
Shift planning and scheduling module
Android mobile app via Capacitor
Desktop app auto-update system
Improved notification rules and alert system

changelog.summary: Complete CAD/RMS rewrite with real-time dispatch

changes.description: Real-time WebSocket dispatch with live sync
Google Maps integration with unit tracking
SSL/TLS encryption support
Fleet management module
Citation and warrant management
Invoice system
Complete UI redesign with beveled panel system
JWT token refresh, session management, account lockout

changelog.summary: Initial release — basic CAD dispatch and records management

changes.description: Calls for service dispatch
Incident report management
Person and vehicle records
User authentication and role-based access
Activity logging and audit trail
